news_items.headline: MLBPA sees clear distance from MLB in CBA talks
news_items.summary: Bruce Meyer, interim executive director and lead negotiator for MLBPA, believes -- after viewing what MLB proposed -- there's a clear sign of the distance between the two sides just six months before the current collective bargaining agreement expires.

news_items.headline: Ortiz says owner Henry 'worried' about Red Sox
news_items.summary: Hall of Famer David Ortiz said Boston Red Sox owner John Henry is concerned about the direction of his last-place team.

news_items.headline: Giants put RP Peguero on injured list, DFA Porter
news_items.summary: The San Francisco Giants placed reliever Joel Peguero on the 60-day injured list with a left hamstring strain Monday, while also selecting pitcher Wilkin Ramos and infielder Buddy Kennedy from Triple-A, and designating catcher Logan Porter for assignment.

news_items.headline: Reds' De La Cruz lands on IL with hamstring strain...
news_items.summary: Reds shortstop Elly De La Cruz, who strained his right hamstring Sunday, has an initial timeline to return of 2-4 weeks.

news_items.headline: Rangers call up Ahlstrom for major league debut
news_items.summary: The Rangers purchased the contract of left-handed pitcher Robby Ahlstrom and have recalled right-hander Luis Cervelo and infielder Cody Freeman from Triple-A Round Rock ahead of Monday night's game against the Cardinals.

news_items.headline: Jays' Sanchez hurts wrist on ball thrown by fan
news_items.summary: Blue Jays outfielder Jesus Sánchez left Sunday's game against the Orioles after he was hit on the wrist by a ball thrown from the stands.

news_items.headline: Copy of 😈 Pirates' post-sweep troll takes 'W' out of Twin...
news_items.summary: The Pirates posted Minnesota's logo on X with a minor tweak -- the W in "Twins" was edited out.

news_items.headline: Colorado Rockies announce three pitching moves
news_items.summary: TJ Shook will make his MLB debut, while Zach Agnos was optioned to Triple-A
